metadata.description: Flow — a learning runtime for Claude Code (kernel + pluggable cells of skills)

plugins.name: flow
plugins.description: Three kernel primitives (ingest, run, reflect) that move work through pluggable pipelines (cells). Code-pipeline starter ships bundled.

plugins.name: code-pipeline
plugins.description: Bundled starter cell — explore, plan, implement, review, ship stages for code work.
